---
id: query-automation-list
title: "查询自动化列表"
description: "查询自动化列表，支持通过自动化类型、排序方式、分页等参数进行筛选和检索。"
sidebar_label: "查询自动化列表"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询自动化列表"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询自动化列表，支持通过自动化类型、排序方式、分页等参数进行筛选和检索。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"definitionTypes","required":false,"description":"自动化类型列表。    \n支持如下值：\nSCRIPT_JSON：通过 API 创建的 Flow 自动化。  \nSCRIPT_TEXT：通过 Aqara Studio Web 页面创建的 Flow 自动化。  \nWHEN_IF_THEN：Classic 自动化。  \nLEGACY_FLOW：Flow 自动化（旧版）。  \nLEGACY_LINKAGE：Logic 自动化。  \nOTHER：其他自动化类型。    \n示例：definitionTypes=SCRIPT_JSON,LEGACY_FLOW 或 definitionTypes=SCRIPT_JSON&definitionTypes=LEGACY_FLOW。    \n不传或空值时查询全部类型。\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"]}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"in":"query","name":"automationName","required":false,"description":"自动化名称模糊匹配关键字；不传或空值时不做名称过滤。","schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"回家亮灯"},{"in":"query","name":"spaceIds","required":false,"description":"是否查询指定空间 ID 列表下的自动化。示例：spaceIds=xx1,xx2 或 spaceIds=xx1&spaceIds=xx2。为空时不按指定空间过滤。","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"in":"query","name":"needChildren","required":false,"description":"是否查询 spaceIds 指定空间的子空间内的自动化。仅当 spaceIds 参数有值时此参数才生效。","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}},{"in":"query","name":"spaceAssociated","required":false,"description":"是否根据自动化与空间的关联关系进行过滤。\n- 不传（默认）：不根据空间关联过滤，返回所有自动化。\n- true：仅返回已关联空间的自动化。\n- false：仅返回未关联空间的自动化；此时 spaceIds 和 needChildren 参数不生效。\n","schema":{"type":"boolean","nullable":true}},{"in":"query","name":"orderBy","required":false,"description":"排序方式。支持如下值：\n- createTime asc：按创建时间升序；\n- createTime desc：按创建时间降序。\n","schema":{"type":"string","default":"createTime asc","enum":["createTime asc","createTime desc"]},"example":"createTime asc"},{"in":"query","name":"pageNum","description":"页码","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":1}},{"in":"query","name":"pageSize","description":"每页条数","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":200}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["totalCount","pageNum","pageSize","data"],"properties":{"totalCount":{"type":"integer","description":"满足条件的自动化总数。"},"pageNum":{"type":"integer","description":"当前页码。"},"pageSize":{"type":"integer","description":"当前页大小。"},"data":{"type":"array","description":"自动化列表。","items":{"type":"object","required":["automationId","name","enabled","definitionType","createTime"],"properties":{"automationId":{"type":"string","description":"自动化 ID。"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"自动化名称。"},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否启用。true：启用；false：禁用。"},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"],"description":"自动化类型，说明如下： <br />\n- SCRIPT_JSON：通过 API 创建的 Flow 自动化。  \n- SCRIPT_TEXT：通过 Aqara Studio Web 页面创建的 Flow 自动化。  \n- WHEN_IF_THEN：Classic 自动化。  \n- LEGACY_FLOW：Flow 自动化（旧版）。  \n- LEGACY_LINKAGE：Logic 自动化。  \n- OTHER：其他自动化类型。\n"},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"创建时间（毫秒级 UTC 时间戳）"},"manualTriggers":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"description":"可用的手动触发器列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["triggerNodeId","triggerName"],"properties":{"triggerNodeId":{"type":"string","description":"手动触发器 ID"},"triggerName":{"type":"string","description":"手动触发器名称"}},"title":"AutomationManualTriggerBrief"}},"space":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["spaceId","name"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"空间 ID。"},"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"父空间 ID。"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"空间名称。"},"spatialMarking":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"空间标记。"},"children":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"items":"circular(SpaceNode)","description":"子空间列表（递归结构）。"}},"title":"SpaceNode"}],"nullable":true,"description":"自动化当前关联的空间。若自动化未关联空间时，此值为 null。"}},"title":"AutomationSummary"}}},"title":"AutomationListData"}}}],"title":"AutomationListResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数 xxx 不能为空"},"description":"错误响应，错误信息通过 code 与 message 提供","allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"}],"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"未认证或认证失效","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000002","code":401,"message":"token 已过期，请重新生成 token"},"description":"错误响应，错误信息通过 code 与 message
